source_description: Derived from Sean's machine state where genesis-image-generation MCP server was configured with a real Google Gemini API key in its env block. Expanded to 4 MCP servers to cover stdio (deferred + eager), SSE transport, and the top_k curation path. All keys and Bearer tokens redacted.

files_sanitized.source_type: genesis-core TOML config with 4 MCP servers
preserved: 4 distinct server entries covering all transport types

files_sanitized.source_type: synthetic cron job using Skill target (not slash/channel)
preserved: skill target kind (tests the Skill arm of Target enum — F-014 class)

scenarios_that_replay_this: T6: boot with sealed env (env_clear + allowlist) — assert image-gen server gets only its fixture env block, not host GENESIS_IMG_API_KEY
T6: boot — assert ready event lists 4 MCP servers; deferred ones appear in tool list as name-only stubs
T6: cron list — assert skill target job appears with target.kind=skill
T6: MCP curation top_k=10 — assert tool list is capped at 10 entries per turn
